description_long: This is a modern tactical rifle with a matte black finish, featuring a collapsible stock and a detachable box magazine. The rifle is equipped with a vertical foregrip for enhanced control and a mounted optical scope for improved aiming accuracy. The upper receiver has a Picatinny rail system, allowing for the attachment of various accessories. The barrel is of standard length and ends with a flash hider. The pistol grip and stock are ergonomically designed for comfort and stability. The overall construction appears robust, primarily composed of metal and polymer components.
description: A matte black tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, vertical foregrip, optical scope, and detachable box magazine.
description_view_0: Side view showing the collapsible stock, pistol grip, vertical foregrip, scope, and full length of the barrel.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel's muzzle, vertical foregrip, and the alignment of the scope.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the magazine, stock, and mounted scope, mirroring the main features of the first side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the buttstock, pistol grip, and the rear end of the scope.
